mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: WE WOULD LOVE TO SEE YOU IN YOUR FORMAL ATTIRE THAT SUITS IN OUR COLOR MOTIF

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: For Ninongs: Black suit with navy blue tie. For Ninangs: Navy blue long gown.

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Formal or semi-formal attire in the designated color palette.
sections.description: Gentlemen are kindly requested to wear a formal or semi-formal suit, complemented by a necktie or bowtie, in the designated color palette. Ladies may grace the occasion in a formal or semi-formal gown, also within the designated color palette.
